name_cn:
Genuine quality
Mon Tresor
Light blue leather mini bag for more details
Mon Tresor small bucket bag, with drawstring and Fendi metal logo decoration. Equipped with one long and one short detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody. Light blue calfskin material. Black hand-painted embossed FF iconic print pattern. Gold metal hardware. Made in Italy
